posts.raw_content:
I like what Data republican does by digging in and publicly disclosing hidden/unknown relationships.

I like what O'Keefe does at OMG.

Maybe require all elected officials to wear uniforms like race car drivers with the names and symbols of their top twenty donors displayed PROMINENTLY on their chest, back, legs and arms.

AND require a prominent QR CODE displayed on this uniform at all times. On all their vehicles and every podium when they speak at press conferences and when they speak in congress or the senate.

This QR code will link directly to lists of all donors to this elected official. It will also list all their relatives from Great Grandparents through children and grandchildren. Their spouse or anyone they have cohabitated with. Their religion and religious affiliations. Then a listing of all their assets,  their spouses assets and ANY beneficial interests they hold in any entity. The asset list would include dates purchased, price paid AND the SOURCE of funds used to purchase every asset.

Also, list EVERY noncash gift received EVER such as clothing, jewelry, vehicles, real estate, trips domestic, trips foreign, food, medical artwork.

ANY violations of these requirements is a STRIKE. THREE STRIKES and the elected official is DISQUALIFIED from holding ANY public office for 5 years.
